hero.title: Sculpting Stories through Cinematic Video & 3D Motion Graphics
hero.description: I craft immersive digital experiences for brands looking to transcend standard visual layouts. Specialized in cinematic editing, complex VFX simulations, and mouse-reactive 3D graphics environments.

services.title: Cinematic Video Production
services.description: Crafting commercial reels, dynamic pacing cuts, narrative flow, and high-fidelity soundscapes that command absolute audience retention.

services.title: 3D Motion Design
services.description: Modeling and animating premium liquid metal geometries, bespoke logo reveals, and futuristic hardware mesh concepts with hyperreal textures.

services.title: DaVinci Color Grading
services.description: Injecting atmospheric, cinema-standard color matching, skin tone corrections, and custom LUT compositions for a cohesive aesthetic signature.

services.title: VFX Compositing
services.description: Integrating green-screen keying, advanced particle tracking, lighting composites, and celestial CGI overlays seamlessly into raw footage.

journey.title: Lead Creative Director
journey.description: Directing large-scale marketing visuals, cinema-standard teaser trailers, and mouse-reactive 3D web environments. Leading a team of digital designers to ship high-impact campaigns.

journey.title: Elite Freelance Video Editor & Motion Designer
journey.description: Partnered with gaming studios and digital agencies to deliver fluid rhythm edits and high-fidelity product renders, yielding over 10M+ collective impressions.

journey.title: VFX Compositor & Colorist
journey.description: Engineered DaVinci Resolve color pipelines, camera tracking, composite integrations, and digital matte scene constructions for cinematic client projects.
